description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Azure App Service lets you run web apps, mobile app back ends, and API apps in the cloud. The REST API manages App Service plans, web apps, slots, configurations, deployments, and certificates.
